project_name: Lucky Jack - Switzerland Lotto Pattern Analyzer

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid for Data-Heavy Dashboards

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] hover:bg-[#27272A] text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-[#0F0F10] border border-[#27272A] focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white placeholder-gray-500
components.table_headers: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-[#A1A1AA] border-b border-[#27272A] pb-3
components.tabs: flex space-x-1 bg-[#18181A] p-1 rounded-lg border border-[#27272A]
components.tab_item: px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-colors

badges.blue: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-mono
badges.orange: bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-400 border border-orange-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-mono

icons_and_assets.sizing: w-5 h-5 for general use, w-4 h-4 for dense tables/inline

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for layouts and basic components. Use Shadcn UI for complex interactives like Dialogs/Modals, Tabs, and Dropdowns if needed.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all lottery numbers and statistics.
Ensure the dashboard feels dense but readable. Use 1px borders (#27272A) to separate regions instead of heavy shadows or distinct background colors.
For the Draw History table, ensure monospace font is used for the Draw # and Numbers columns.
Data visualization percentages should use the predefined blue (1-21) and orange (22-42) accent colors.
Maintain high contrast text: White (#FFFFFF) for primary values, Zinc-400 (#A1A1AA) for labels and secondary text.
All JS files (not TSX). Ensure React components use .jsx or standard .js syntax suitable for the setup.
Always apply data-testid to interactive elements as defined in testing attributes.
